newQuiz.stem: The police ___ still looking for the suspect, and ___ news about the case ___ broadcast every hour.
newQuiz.explanation: police 為集合名詞但永遠搭配複數動詞 are;news 雖字尾 s 卻不可數用單數 is 且泛指時零冠詞,故 are / (無冠詞) / is。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ police 看似單數實為複數恆用 are;news 看似複數卻不可數恆用 is,兩個常見字方向相反,且 news 泛指不加冠詞。

newQuiz.stem: Mrs. Lin asked the two new ___ to introduce themselves before the meeting began.
newQuiz.explanation: 複合名詞 passer-by 的核心字是 passer,複數在核心字加 s→passers-by;two new 證明須用複數。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 複合名詞變複數在『主要名詞』加 s 而非字尾,passer-bys 加錯位置;by 是介系詞不變,故非 passers-bies。

newQuiz.stem: Neither the manager nor the two assistants ___ aware that the ___ had already left the building.
newQuiz.explanation: neither...nor 採就近原則,動詞與最近的 the two assistants(複數)一致用 were;staff 作『全體員工』為集合名詞,泛指此處用原形 staff。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ neither A nor B 動詞看靠近的 B,B 為複數故 were,別被前面單數 manager 誤導;staff 集合名詞不加 s,staffs 僅在指多個團隊時才用。

newQuiz.stem: She has made great ___ in her studies, but there is still ___ room for improvement.
newQuiz.explanation: progress 為不可數名詞,無複數也不加 a,故用原形;room 作『空間/餘地』時不可數,用修飾不可數的 much。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ progress 永遠不可數,progresses 與 a progress 皆錯;room 此處非『房間』(可數)而是抽象『餘地』(不可數)故用 much 不用 many。

newQuiz.stem: The ___ in this old story all end happily, which is why ___ love reading them to their kids.
newQuiz.explanation: hero 字尾子音+o,變複數加 es→heroes;mother 規則複數加 s,且後句泛指一般母親用複數 mothers。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ hero、potato、tomato 等子音+o 結尾加 es,heros 為常見拼寫錯誤;此處泛指母親用 mothers,並非 mother-in-law 之複合名詞。

newQuiz.stem: A number of ___ been damaged in the flood, but the amount of ___ needed to repair them is still unknown.
newQuiz.explanation: a number of + 複數名詞(buildings)接複數動詞 have;the amount of money 主詞核心為不可數 money,動詞用單數,故 is。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ a number of(許多)用複數 have,與 the number of 相反;money 不可數無 moneys,且 the amount of 後動詞看不可數本體用 is 而非 are。

newQuiz.stem: There ___ a series of accidents on this road, so the city installed ___ new traffic lights last month.
newQuiz.explanation: a series of 視為單一系列為單數,動詞用 has been;traffic lights 可數複數,用修飾可數的 a few。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ a series of 雖後接複數仍當單數用 has,易誤選 have;a few 修飾可數(lights),a little 修飾不可數,選 a little 即被誤導。

newQuiz.stem: The number of ___ visiting the museum ___ doubled, yet ___ of the exhibits remain unchanged.
newQuiz.explanation: the number of 後接複數名詞 tourists,但主詞核心是 the number(單數)故用 has doubled;exhibits 可數,many of the exhibits。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ the number of tourists 的真正主詞是 the number(單數)用 has,別被 tourists 誘選 have;exhibits 可數須用 many 而非 much。

newQuiz.stem: He spilled ___ all over the table, and now there are several ___ on the carpet too.
newQuiz.explanation: ink 為不可數名詞,不加 a、不加 s,用原形;stain(污漬)可數,several 須接複數 stains。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ ink 不可數,an ink 與 inks 皆錯;stain 為一般可數名詞規則加 s,staines 是杜撰拼法,several 後須真複數。

newQuiz.stem: All the ___ on the farm were sold, including five ___ and a dozen ___.
newQuiz.explanation: cattle 為恆複數集合名詞無 -s;ox 的不規則複數為 oxen;goose 的不規則複數為 geese,故 cattle / oxen / geese。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ cattle 沒有 cattles 形式;ox→oxen、goose→geese 皆為母音變化或加 -en 的不規則複數,加 -s 一律錯。

newQuiz.stem: Economics ___ often considered difficult, but the statistics in this report ___ surprisingly clear.
newQuiz.explanation: Economics 作學科名為單數用 is;statistics 在此指『一組數據』為可數複數用 are,故 is / are。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ economics 作學科單數,但 statistics 指『統計數據(複數筆)』時用 are、指『統計學』時才單數;同字尾 -s 卻因語意一單一複。

newQuiz.stem: I need ___ to wrap the gift, and please hand me ___ from the drawer to cut the ribbon.
options: two pieces of paper / a pair of scissors
newQuiz.explanation: paper(紙)不可數,計量用 pieces/sheets of paper;scissors 恆複數成對工具,計量用 a pair of scissors。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ paper 不可數不能加 s(papers 指『報告/論文』語意不符);scissors 無單數 scissor,且 sheets of papers 量詞後名詞仍不能加 s。

newQuiz.stem: The jury ___ divided in their opinions; some wanted to convict, while ___ believed the man was innocent.
newQuiz.explanation: jury 作集合名詞但強調『成員各持己見』時當複數用 were;some...others 表『有些...另一些(非全部)』故用 others。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 集合名詞 jury 強調成員分歧時用複數 were,與視為整體時的單數相反;some...others 為不定指,加 the(the others)則變特指全部剩餘者語意不符。

newQuiz.stem: Each of the ___ was given ___ to complete the obstacle course within ten minutes.
newQuiz.explanation: each of the + 複數名詞 athletes;主詞核心 each 為單數用 was,給『一次』機會 a chance 與單數一致。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ each of the 後須接複數名詞(athletes),但動詞與所給單位仍依 each 為單數;故 a chance 對應 each 的單數,two chances 與 each 不合。

newQuiz.stem: The ___ of the orchestra ___ tuning their instruments when the conductor walked in.
newQuiz.explanation: 整個樂團有多位樂手故用複數 musicians;主詞 musicians 為複數,過去進行式用 were tuning。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ of the orchestra 是修飾語,真正主詞是前面的 musicians(複數)用 were;別被單數的 orchestra 干擾而誤選 was。

newQuiz.stem: The waiter brought us two ___ of tea and a ___ of bread to share before the main course.
newQuiz.explanation: tea 不可數用 cup 計量,two 使量詞變複數 cups;bread 不可數用 loaf 計量,a 對應單數量詞 loaf,故 cups / loaf。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 變複數的是量詞(cup→cups)而非不可數的 tea/bread;a loaf 為單數量詞配 a,選 loaves 與 a 不一致,別把量詞與名詞混淆。

newQuiz.stem: Either the twins or their mother ___ going to drive, because ___ of them knows the way well.
newQuiz.explanation: either...or 就近原則,動詞與最近的 their mother(單數)一致用 is;each of them 強調『每一個』搭配單數 knows,符合語意。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ either A or B 動詞看靠近的 B(mother 單數)用 is,別被前面複數 twins 誤導;both of them 接複數動詞 know,與後面 knows 不一致。

newQuiz.stem: The ___ damage caused by the typhoon was huge, but luckily there ___ only a few minor ___.
newQuiz.explanation: damage 不可數,The damage 已特指不需數量詞故第一空為無冠詞修飾;there be 與最近主詞 a few minor injuries(複數)一致用 were;injury 可數,a few 接複數 injuries。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ damage 不可數不可用 many 修飾;a few 須接複數 injuries,且 there be 看後面複數用 were 而非 was。

newQuiz.stem: The ___ at this resort include a spa, two pools, and a gym, which is why ___ visit it every summer.
newQuiz.explanation: 列舉多項設施故用複數,facility 子音+y 變複數去 y 加 ies→facilities;family 同理變 families,泛指一般家庭用複數。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ facility 與 family 皆為子音+y 結尾,變複數須去 y 加 ies;facilitys、familys 為母音+y 規則的誤套,一律錯。

newQuiz.stem: Half of the ___ on the shelf ___ missing, and half of the milk in the bottle ___ gone too.
newQuiz.explanation: half of + 名詞動詞依該名詞:books 可數複數用 are;milk 不可數用 is,故 books are / is。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ half of / most of / some of 的動詞看 of 後名詞的可數性:books(複數)用 are,milk(不可數)用 is,兩者方向不同極易混淆。

newQuiz.stem: This is ___ office; both of them share it, but the books over there are ___.
newQuiz.explanation: 兩人『共同擁有』一間辦公室,所有格只在最後一個名詞加 's→James and Tom's;the books 的所有格代名詞用 theirs(後不接名詞)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 共同擁有只在最後一名詞加 's(James and Tom's);若各自擁有才兩者都加 's。theirs 為所有格代名詞獨立使用,their 後須接名詞故不可。
